stages.concept:
# Unit 132: 관계대명사의 계속적 용법 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **관계대명사의 계속적 용법**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: 관계대명사에는 **제한적 용법**과 **계속적 용법** 두 가지가 있어요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **제한적 용법** — 콤마 없이, 선행사를 한정

> I have a friend **who** lives in Paris.
> 나는 파리에 사는 친구가 있다. (여러 친구 중 파리에 사는 친구)

👩‍🏫 선생님: **계속적 용법** — 콤마(,) + 관계대명사, 부가적 설명

> I have a friend, **who** lives in Paris.
> 나는 친구가 있는데, 그 친구는 파리에 산다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 계속적 용법에서는 **and/but + 대명사**로 바꿀 수 있어요.

> She met Tom, **who** gave her a flower.
> = She met Tom, **and he** gave her a flower.

> He bought the car, **which** was very expensive.
> = He bought the car, **and it** was very expensive.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 계속적 용법에서는 **that을 쓸 수 없어요!**

> ❌ He bought the car, **that** was expensive.
> ✅ He bought the car, **which** was expensive.

**Q. 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 합칠 때, 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 단어를 고르세요.**
"I have two brothers. And they are both doctors."
= "I have two brothers, (       ) are both doctors."
1. who ✅
2. that
3. which

👩‍🏫 선생님: 사람 선행사(two brothers)를 부가적으로 설명하는 계속적 용법(콤마 뒤)이므로 who를 써야 해요. that은 콤마 뒤에 쓸 수 없고, which는 선행사가 사물일 때 쓰니까요.

🧑‍🎓 학생: 콤마 없으면 제한적(한정), 콤마 있으면 계속적(부가 설명)! 계속적 용법에서는 that 사용 불가!
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 132: 관계대명사의 계속적 용법 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I got a call from a man, (     ) saw me at the store.
> **정답** who

---

**02.** She bought a bag, ? was very expensive.
> **정답** which

---

**03.** I met Tom, ? is my cousin.
> **정답** who

---

**04.** He gave me a book, ? I really liked.
> **정답** which

---

**05.** She has a cat, ? is very cute.
> **정답** which

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I met Amy, that is my best friend.
(계속적 용법에 that 사용 불가)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** that → who

---

**07.** She bought a dress, that was very pretty.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** that → which

---

**08.** He has a brother, that lives in Seoul.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** that → who

---

**09.** I read a book, that was very long.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** that → which

---

**10.** She visited Busan, that is a big city.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** that → which

---

**11.** 두 문장을 관계대명사의 계속적 용법으로 연결하시오.
I met Amy. She is a doctor.
> **정답** I met Amy, who is a doctor.

---

**12.** She bought a ring. It was very expensive.
> **정답** She bought a ring, which was very expensive.

---

**13.** He has a dog. It is very friendly.
> **정답** He has a dog, which is very friendly.

---

**14.** I visited Seoul. It is the capital of Korea.
> **정답** I visited Seoul, which is the capital of Korea.

---

**15.** She called Tom. He is her brother.
> **정답** She called Tom, who is her brother.

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
나는 Amy를 만났는데, 그녀는 의사이다.
met I Amy who is a doctor
> **정답** I / met / Amy, / who / is / a / doctor

---

**17.** 그녀는 가방을 샀는데, 그것은 비쌌다.
She a bought bag which was expensive
> **정답** She / bought / a / bag, / which / was / expensive

---

**18.** 그는 형이 있는데, 서울에 산다.
has He a brother who lives in Seoul
> **정답** He / has / a / brother, / who / lives / in / Seoul

---

**19.** 나는 서울을 방문했는데, 한국의 수도이다.
visited I Seoul which is the capital of Korea
> **정답** I / visited / Seoul, / which / is / the / capital / of / Korea

---

**20.** 그녀는 Tom에게 전화했는데, 그는 그녀의 오빠이다.
called She Tom who is her brother
> **정답** She / called / Tom, / who / is / her / brother
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 132: 관계대명사의 계속적 용법 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
I made some syrup, ______ made the tea special.
Amy told me about his new boyfriend, ______ lives in
New York.
who - that
which - that
which - who
that - who
> **정답** which - who

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
He was a famous architect, ______ designed the
building.
There will be another new hotel, ______ will help
villagers make more money.
which - that
who - which
who - that
that - which
> **정답** who - which

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
I bought a new sofa, ______ looked so nice.
The teacher, ______ gave me advice, was Mr. Brown.
which - who
what - that
which - that
who - that
> **정답** which - who

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Mr. Kim has a daughter, ______ likes to play
badminton.
Dad repaired the computer, ______ works very well
now.
which - that
who - what
who- which
that - that
> **정답** who- which

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
I lied to my mother, ______ made her very upset.
Any student, ______ knows the answer, stand up
please.
who - that
that - who
which - who
who - which
> **정답** which - who

---

**06.** 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 나머지 넷과 다른 것을 고르시오.
He grew up to be an inventor, ______ invented
the telephone.
I'll introduce our new program, ______ will
help you lose weight.
The flight was delayed for another 30 minutes,
______ made everyone angry.
I like the paintings, ______ were painted by
my mother.
> **정답** He grew up to be an inventor, ______ invented the telephone.

---

**07.** 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 나머지 넷과 다른 것을 고르시오.
There are five more people, ______ ordered
this new bag.
She has a beautiful voice, ______ moves
people.
Mr. Kim is a cook, ______ studied cooking in
France.
The new math teacher, ______ is my mother's
friend, will come to school today.
> **정답** She has a beautiful voice, ______ moves people.

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그는 어려운 사람들을 돕는데, 그것은 그를 매우 행복하게
만든다.
He helps the poor, that makes him very
happy.
He helps the poor, which makes him very
happy.
He helps the poor who make him very happy.
He helps the poor, it makes him very happy.
> **정답** He helps the poor, which makes him very happy.

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
우리는 한 외국인을 만났는데, 그는 도움을 요청했다.
We met a foreigner, that asked us for help.
We met a foreigner, who asked us for help.
We met a foreigner, he asked us for help.
We met a foreigner, whom asked us for help.
> **정답** We met a foreigner, who asked us for help.

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom은 또 지각을 했는데, 그 사실이 선생님을 화나게 했다.
Tom was late again, it made the teacher
upset.
Tom was late again, who made the teacher
upset.
Tom was late again, which made the teacher
upset.
Tom was late again, he made the teacher
upset.
> **정답** Tom was late again, which made the teacher upset.

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 문장을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
Tom, that is a famous baseball player, is my
old friend.
His roommate lent him the book, who I have
not read yet.
These are her daughters, who are twin
singers.
The pandas that live in forests in China are in
danger.
> **정답** Tom, that is a famous baseball player, is my old friend.
> **정답His roommate lent him the book, who I have not read yet.

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 문장을 고르시오.
Tom passed the entrance exam, that
surprised his family.
The girl, who drives the SUV, is his sister.
It rained all night, which was good for the
garden.
He has a son that is a famous scientist.
> **정답** Tom passed the entrance exam, that surprised his family.

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 문장을 고르시오.
He is an assistant, who works with us.
My uncle gave me a dog, which is afraid of
other dogs.
The cake, that mom made, was delicious.
Tom is a child, who we should look after.
> **정답** The cake, that mom made, was delicious.

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 문장을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
Tom is a person which likes swimming.
Do you know the man who is playing soccer
over there?
Indonesia is a country, that has many islands.
The woman had two sons, who became
doctors.
> **정답** Indonesia is a country, that has many islands., Tom is a person which likes swimming.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 올바른 문장을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
We know a man who son is an artist.
The boy, who drew the cartoon, is my brother.
I will meet the girl, who you mentioned two
days ago.
We missed the bus, that meant we might be
late.
> **정답** I will meet the girl, who you mentioned two days ago., The boy, who drew the cartoon, is my brother.

---

**16.** 다음 문장을 관계대명사를 사용하여 바꿔 쓰시오. (단,
계속적 용법을 사용할 것)
He has one sister, and she is a lawyer.
→ He has one sister,
.
> **정답** who, is, a, lawyer

---

**17.** 다음 문장을 관계대명사를 사용하여 바꿔 쓰시오. (단,
계속적 용법을 사용할 것)
I traveled the world for five years, and it surprised
everybody.
→ I traveled the world for five years,
.
> **정답** which, surprised, everybody

---

**18.** 다음 문장을 관계대명사를 사용하여 바꿔 쓰시오. (단,
계속적 용법을 사용할 것)
Amy went to the restaurant, and it is her favorite
restaurant.
→ Amy went to the restaurant,
.
> **정답** which, is, her, favorite, restaurant

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
My teacher bought me this
book, that has influenced me a
lot.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** that → which

---

**20.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Tom, which was sick all
day, couldn't do his
homework.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** which → who
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 132 관계대명사의 계속적 용법중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 다음 두 문장을 계속적 용법의 관계사를 이용하여 한
문장으로 바꾸시오.
Tom has a son. Tom's son lives in Korea.
Tom has a son,  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 who, lives, in, Korea

---

**02.** 다음 두 문장을 계속적 용법의 관계사를 이용하여 한
문장으로 바꾸시오.
I live in a small town. It is located in a valley.
I live in a small town,  (     )   (     )   (     )  
  (     ) .
정답 which, is, located, in, a, valley

---

**03.** 다음 두 문장을 계속적 용법의 관계사를 이용하여 한
문장으로 바꾸시오.
I saw Steven. He was hurt severely.
I saw Steven,  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
• severely 심하게
정답 who, was, hurt, severely

---

**04.** 다음 두 문장을 계속적 용법의 관계사를 이용하여 한
문장으로 바꾸시오.
Tom tried to save the man. It was very dangerous.
Tom tried to save the man,  (     )   (     )  
.
정답 which, was, very, dangerous

---

**05.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
[Amy]  [will]  [invite]  [James,]  [that]  [is]
[her]  [best]  [friend.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 that → who

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 관계대명사절이 되도록 틀린 부분을
선택하고, 고쳐쓰세요.
[We]  [visited]  [Tom]  ['s]  [house,]  it
[is]  [near]  [our]  [school.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 it → which

---

**07.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
[The]  [woman,]  [which]  [works]  [at]  a
[pharmacy,]  [is]  [very]  [friendly.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 which → who

---

**08.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
나는 Edison에 관한 책을 읽었는데, 그는 전구를 발명했
다.
힌트 (     ) invent, the light bulb
I read a book about Edison,  (     )   (     )  
  (     ) .
정답 who, invented, the, light, bulb

---

**09.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
누군가 영화관에서 전화를 했는데, 그것이 짜증나게 했다.
힌트 (     ) be, annoying
Someone talked on the phone in the theater, 
  (     ) .
정답 which, was, annoying

---

**10.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
내가 제일 좋아하는 책은 해리포터인데, 나는 그 책을 지금
까지 세번 읽었다.
힌트 (     ) read, three times, 현재완료시제 사용
My favorite book is Harry Potter,  (     )  
  (     )   (     )   (     )  so far.
정답 which, I, have, read, three, times

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 132: 관계대명사의 계속적 용법 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
I made some juice, ______ made the breakfast special.
Tom told me about his new friend, ______ lives in Paris.
who - that which - that which - who that - who
> 정답: which - who

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
She was a famous professor, ______ wrote the textbook.
There will be another new library, ______ will help students study better.
which - that who - which who - that that - which
> 정답: who - which

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
I bought a new lamp, ______ looked so elegant.
The doctor, ______ gave me medicine, was Dr. Kim. which - who what - that which - that who - that
> 정답: which - who

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Ms. Park has a son, ______ likes to play tennis.
Mom fixed the bicycle, ______ works very well now. which - that who - what who- which that - that
> 정답: who- which

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
I forgot to bring my homework, ______ made the teacher disappointed.
Any student, ______ knows the answer, raise your hand please.
who - that that - who which - who who - which
> 정답: which - who

---

**06.** 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 나머지 넷과 다른 것을 고르시오.
He grew up to be a scientist, ______ discovered new elements.
I'll introduce our new app, ______ will help you track your health.
The bus was delayed for another 20 minutes, ______ made everyone frustrated.
I like the paintings, ______ were drawn by my sister.
> 정답: He grew up to be an inventor, ______ invented the telephone.

---

**07.** 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 나머지 넷과 다른 것을 고르시오.
There are three more students, ______ submitted this assignment.
She has a lovely voice, ______ impresses people.
Mr. Kim is a baker, ______ studied baking in France.
The new music teacher, ______ is my dad's friend, will start classes today.
> 정답: She has a lovely voice, ______ impresses people.

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그녀는 아이들을 가르치는데, 그것은 그녀를 매우 행복하게 만든다.
She teaches children, that makes her very happy.
She teaches children, which makes her very happy.
She teaches children who make her very happy.
She teaches children, it makes her very happy.
> 정답: She teaches children, which makes her very happy.

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
우리는 한 여행자를 만났는데, 그녀는 길을 물어봤다.
We met a traveler, that asked us for directions.
We met a traveler, who asked us for directions.
We met a traveler, she asked us for directions.
We met a traveler, whom asked us for directions.
> 정답: We met a traveler, who asked us for directions.

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Amy는 또 시험에 떨어졌는데, 그 사실이 부모님을 걱정하게 했다.
Amy failed the exam again, it made her parents worried.
Amy failed the exam again, who made her parents worried.
Amy failed the exam again, which made her parents worried.
Amy failed the exam again, she made her parents worried.
> 정답: Amy failed the exam again, which made her parents worried.

---
